package com.other;

// Negative: a Report.error call with no import - the bare qualifier resolves to
// this file's own package (com.other), not nl.tsym.tackbox.report. Origin is the
// identity, not the name: a same-named Report from another package is not the
// helper, so the catch still swallows.
class ReportOtherPackageDecoy {
    void m() {
        try {
            risky();
        } catch (Exception e) { // want "JV001"
            Report.error("boom", e, null, "area.key");
        }
    }

    void risky() throws Exception {}
}
